3119040.name: Crumble Party!
3119040.description:
Welcome to Crumble Party!

You are a cake nanite. Your job is to rebuild the towns through cooperatives, sustainability, and pound cakes.

Make your way across the board, discovering this new baked goods world!

  • Trade with fellow nanites for new abilities

  • Pay folks for their aid in revitalizing the town

  • Invest in environmental groups to stabilize new ecosystems

  • Avoid sabotage from Halbert, the mischievous AI that wants all the pound cakes for himself

  • Explore a small world that runs on a sustainable solidarity economic system.

  • Cake Harvester Mini-Game

                                 

                                                                  Harvest Pound Cake

Cake pieces will fall after you've harvested them. Harvest as many pieces of the cake as you can before time runs out!

                                                                   Beware of Sabotage

A selfish AI named Halbert sends their minions to push you off the cake. Don't let yourself fall off the cake!

                                                                     Rebuild Your Town

Gather as much pound cake as you can without dying and without harvesting all the cake. Pound Cake slices will be exchanged for the coveted Cake Tokens that will provide Sol Energy resources for the town.

Will you get enough Cake Tokens to help rebuild your town?

                                                                     Developers

  • Wayne M Messam II

  • Mattia Sicuro

  • Maggie H

  • MISTER ACXION

  • Dave (ViRiX) McKee

  • Megan Frazier

  • Danielle Wallace

  • ShadowF

  • Terence Tolman

  • Dotun Oseni-Adegbite

  • Zubaydah Bashir

                                                                              Controls:

  • W = Move Up

  • A = Move Down

  • S = Move Right

  • D = Move

  • Left SHIFT = Dash

  • SPACE = Harvest

  • Left Mouse Click = Shoot Attack

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
